title: The Wedding Bells.
content:
The Wedding Bells were ringing,
    And Monday was the day,
    And all the little ladies
    Were there so fresh and gay.

    And up up up the steps they went,
    The wedding fine to see;
    And the Roses were all for the Bride,
    So pretty so pretty was she.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Kate Greenaway, titled "The Wedding Bells.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
